pi_items.source: Confirmed by install_adaudit_plus.ps1 and task_utils.ps1 constants.
Confirmed by the install scripts and ManageEngine defaults.
Confirmed by install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which programmatically changes the default admin password.
Web search confirms ManageEngine Support Information Files are named Support_ADAuditPlus_<Timestamp>.zip.
Web search and ManageEngine documentation indicate PostgreSQL logs are located in the pgsql/data/pg_log directory, not 'pgsql_log'.

privileged_info_summary: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus is installed locally on port 8081 with credentials admin / Admin@2024. The generated Support Information File (SIF) follows the pattern Support_ADAuditPlus_<Timestamp>.zip, which matches the expected glob. The PostgreSQL database logs are actually stored in pgsql/data/pg_log (not 'pgsql_log') and must be excluded from the zip.
